content:
1st Generation Anthony in America - born in the US, served in the navy, first family has two daughter, the first daughter dies of a brain aneurysm, the wife dies as well—he marries a 19 year old and she has him two sons

2nd Generation Anthony - first born son, grows up to impregnate a woman and is then forced to leave her, goes on a cruise meets another woman shortly thereafter to only marry her and have 3 kids with her and then divorce her 19 years later and gets back together with the first woman

3rd generation Anthony - first born son, grows up to meet the girl of his dreams, artist,

Each generation represented by one generation, reappearing and living in the same three locations, both try and break free from the cycle laid by their parents.

Madison - Arachne - political artist/journalist - famous, yet punished and censored by a recent article she published.

Michelle and Jeff -


Anthony and Madison part ways for Christmas, Anthony stays back at Madison’s home. They are separated by family (Pyramus and Thisbe), she comes back and on Valentine’s day a secret indiscretion is revealed (Jvno and Jov).
